features.name: Water Breathing
features.description: The piranha can breathe only underwater.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5 (with Advantage if the target doesn't have all its Hit Points), reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

tactical_info.positioning: Seeks wounded targets for advantage on attacks
tactical_info.damage_output: 1 piercing per hit with advantage against wounded foes
tactical_info.key_abilities: Blood frenzy advantage, high swim speed, tiny size
tactical_info.weaknesses: Minimal HP and damage individually, effective only in swarms
tactical_info.synergies: Deadly in large groups, particularly against wounded swimmers
